instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable gear shifting during high oil temperature.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall inhibit shift commands when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Max_Temp.

expected_output: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Max_Temp THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Max_Temp THEN Shift_Enable = TRUE
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp_Sensor_Fault = TRUE THEN Shift_Command = Disabled

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall activate protection mode during overheating.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall enable protection mode when Transmission_Oil_Temp exceeds Protection_Temp.

expected_output: IF Transmission_Oil_Temp > Protection_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Enabled
IF Transmission_Oil_Temp <= Protection_Temp THEN Protection_Mode = Disabled
IF Protection_Mode = Enabled THEN Shift_Command = Disabled
